title: EdgarTools dbt Gold Project
scope_summary: Describes the scope, ownership boundaries, and published objects of the dbt gold layer for Snowflake and Databricks. Lists the nine business-facing gold tables managed by this project and clarifies what infrastructure it does not own.
key_requirements: Nine business tables (COMPANY, FILING_ACTIVITY, OWNERSHIP_ACTIVITY, OWNERSHIP_HOLDINGS, ADVISER_OFFICES, ADVISER_DISCLOSURES, PRIVATE_FUNDS, FILING_DETAIL, TICKER_REFERENCE) must be published in EDGARTOOLS_GOLD
On Snowflake, business tables are dbt-managed dynamic tables with TARGET_LAG = DOWNSTREAM
On Databricks, models materialize as tables by default via dbt-databricks; set DBT_DATABRICKS_GOLD_MATERIALIZED=view for development
Status model reads provider-neutral source name SERVING_REFRESH_STATUS
DBT_REFRESH_STATUS_IDENTIFIER must be set when Databricks uses a different source table name
key_constraints: Project does not own Snowflake platform objects created by Terraform
Project does not own storage integrations, Unity Catalog external locations, stages, source-side procedures, or tasks created by infrastructure automation
